category_sources: source_facts.description says liquidctl is a cross-platform tool and drivers for liquid coolers and other devices; official repository repeats this scope.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name is liquidctl; official repository and documentation use lowercase liquidctl branding.
docs_sources: Official liquidctl documentation is hosted on Read the Docs and linked from the project documentation surface.
repo_sources: source_facts.homepage is the official GitHub repository; repository description matches source_facts.description.
tags_sources: source_facts.description identifies liquid coolers and device drivers; official docs/repository describe supported devices and CLI use.
